title: Immersive Vehicles
description: Library for realistic cars, planes, decor, and guns for Minecraft!
body:
!!!NOTICE!!! **This mod does not include any vehicles by default! If you are getting a warning message about missing packs, please download one of the fine packs linked in the Vehicle Packs section below!**   Now with that out of the way…. WE PROUDLY PRESENT TO YOU:![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/245/826/banner.png) From the folks that brought you Minecraft Flight Simulator comes the all-new Immersive Vehicles mod! This mod is the result of over a year's worth of work and is the continuation and future of Minecraft Flight Simulator. # **Content Packs:** **All vehicle packs go in your "mods" folder just like any other mod!** ![ocp_brand_header](https://i.imgur.com/7j56WKI.png) [![ocp_banner_main](https://i.imgur.com/1DcZswS.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles-official-content-pack) [![](https://i.imgur.com/wi3yEwu.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles-official-automobile-pack)![ocp_brand_header](https://i.imgur.com/ho6sM2Q.png) #### **UNU Brand. From Dr\_prof\_Luigi** * **[UNU Parts Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unu-parts-pack)** Required for all of Dr\_prof\_Luigi's packs. Contains critical parts like engines, seats, and bumper stickers. * **[UNU Civilian Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unu-civilian-pack-for-mts)** Cars, buses, trucks, scooters, etc. Pretty much anything else you can think of to use in a city. * **[UNU Military Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unu-military-pack-for-mts)** The military equivalent of the UNU civilian pack. For when you need a gun to go with your vehicle. * **[Expanded UNUverse Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/redcliffe-republic-vehicles-mts-iv)** A set of post-apocalyptic vehicles. Good if you're going to a Mad Max themed map. * **[Air-Cooled Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-air-cooled-vehicles-pack)** Corvairs, VW beetles, and other classic air-cooled cars. * **[Iconic Movie Vehicles Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iconic-movie-vehicles-pack-mts)** Ever dreamt of having your very own Ecto-1? Now's your chance!   #### **Trin Brand. From The Oddly Seagull** * **[Trin Parts Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trin-part-pack)** Adds wheels, seats, engines, and some accessories. Required for all Trin vehicles. * **[Immersive Vehicles Trin Civil Pack V3:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-trin-civil-pack-v3)** Gobs of civil vehicles. A bit more modern than the UNU civil pack, but still great for any city. * **[Military Car Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-seagulls-military-car-pack)** Adds some neat military vehicles. Multiple camo varieties means there's a vehicle for every base location. * **[Emergency Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-trin-emergency-pack)** If flashing lights and sirens are your thing, see this pack of vehicles. * **[Industrial Machinery Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-trin-industrial-machinery-pack)** For when you need to decorate that construction site with something besides pickup trucks.   #### **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_59b65b11-d14e-4595-a304-d2db7e5055df.png)** * **[IFS: Immersive Flying Sim / AD2: Aviator Dreams 2:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-flight-simulator-ifs-immersive-vehicles)** Adds aircraft to game such as airliners and helicopters, each with intricate start up procedures mirroring real life. * **[GAP: Golden Airport Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/golden-airport-pack-immersive-vehicles-content)** A pack that aims to add realistic airliners into the game. * **[HA: Hero Aviation Helicopter Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gyro_heros-helicopter-pack-iv-mts)** Tried of hills and trees making flight difficult? Take off vertically with this pack (and shoot things!).   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_b0790845-04ed-4f77-8700-2a3275c09b0f.png) * **[DKZ: Automotive Branch:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dkz-civilian-market)** A small pack that adds some classic vehicles. If UNU is too new for you, DKZ has you covered! * **[KMW: Kaminari Motor Works:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-generals-general-vehicles-pack)** Collection of Cars, Trucks and Buses from around the world. * **[SVMP:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iv-mts-sphase-vehicle-mashup-pack-svmp)** Various vehicles, from hypercars to old buses! * **[BrickRacers:](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brickracers/files)** A Vehicle pack with a twist! Everything is made of Legos! * **[IVV: Immersive Vehicles Vanity:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-vanity)** Bumper Stickers and Decoration Blocks galore! Also contains vehicles. * **[Blue Seoul Vehicles:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blue-seoul-vehicles)**  Adds korean civilian vehicles * **[Cactus' Vehicle Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-iv-cactuss-vehicle-pack)** A small Vehicle Packthat currently adds a Ford F-150 and Ford Bronco II. * **[Bjorns Custom Garage:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iv-mts-unu-bjorns-customs)** Adds aftermarket body parts for UNU & 2 heavy duty trucks. * **[Imperium:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iv-imperium)** Adds a cute but sturdy 1900s car with interesting suspension mechanics! * **[Driplers Garage:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/driplers-garage)** Adds real american classics with their own engine options, each having unique handling, sound, and power. * **[Aero Corporation:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aero-industries)** Adds a range of real and fictional vehicles. From the smallest kei cars, to the heaviest logging trucks. * **[MAI: Mackrel Automotive Industries:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mackrel-automotive-industries)** A collection of European vehicles from them 40s to the 70s. Ideal if you need something RHD. * **[TRVP: Turbo's Random Vehicles Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/turbos-random-vehicles-pack)** Food trucks? Check. Patty Wagon? Check. Download? Check. * **[Kadwin Jurassic Park Vehicles Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kadwin-jurassic-park-vehicles-pack-mts-iv)** For when you need a vehicle to get you to that remote generic engineering lab. * **[Naomi Retro Vehicles:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iv-naomi-retro-vehicles)** From old to new machinecraft to minecraft these cars are back once again. * **[Waywardcraft Vehicle Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waywardcraft-iv-vehicle-pack)**: A port of the Waywardcraft Flansmod pack. A classic MC vehicle experience. Requires another pack for engines/seats/wheels.   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_3ee7194a-8b42-41b3-9279-60a40bcf9538.png) * **[GT Craft:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gt-craft-iv-mts)** Content pack is inspired by Gran Turismo that includes a variety of sports cars. * **[Craftspeed:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-craftspeed)** Getting a stock car is just the beginning, time to make it your own unique project! * **[R.A.G.E:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-blocky-rage)** A pack that adds different cars that can be disassembled. * **[GustNovs Motorsport:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gustnovs-motorsport)** Adds legendary racing machines like Formula 1 cars, endurance prototypes, and GT racers. * **[IPG: Immersive Poker's Garage:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-iv-immersive-pokers-garage)** World's finest exotic and luxury cars. Adds some exotic supercars, and parts for them ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_9d536c5f-db52-4432-b1d9-84971ebd12db.png) * **[Recurring Air War:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-iv-recurring-air-war)** Adds WW2 and Cold War military aircraft * **[ACME Industries:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/acme-heavy-industries-pack)** Adds a fleet of realistic jets, all from fighters, interceptros to civilian private jets. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_be6c00c2-6e15-475c-9048-8fbbf72e3b0f.png) * **[Potato Vehicle Industries:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/potato-vehicle-industries)** Tanks, fighter jets, helicopters and ground vehicles! Fit for all your military needs. * **[QMP:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iv-mts-q-m-p-qawsed-military-pack)** OCP-styled pack featuring Cold War military equipment, tanks, apcs, IFVs and more. * **[PWIC:](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pwic)** Adds a plethora of OCP-styled cold war era tanks, featuring both soviet and NATO factions. * **[S.L.O.P:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/s-l-o-p-vehicle-pack-mts-iv)** A small content pack adding vanilla styled military planes, apcs, helicopters and tanks from the modern warfare era! * **[IAV Parts Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-iav-parts-pack)** The current parts library for VEB Automobilwerke Schwikau and Mackrel Automotive Industries. * **[VEB: Automobilwerke Schwikau:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-automobilwerke-schwikau-veb)** Do you need a bad car that lasts forever, or maybe a tank or two? One of the more unique offerings! **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_5962a8f0-5efc-4694-afb3-ac5e63e3ee9b.png)** * **[Immersive Farming Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/randall-agriculture-pack)** Tired of farming by hand? Colt 44 has planting and harvesting covered. Robots not included. **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_07930fef-4e77-4c60-831f-77ed79954fdd.png)** * **[WARK:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-wark-vehicles)** A pack focussing on industrial vehicles, from heavy semi trucks to pavers and other construction equipment. * **[WARK Parts:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-iv-wark-parts)** Parts for WARK and other packs! * **[Caterpillar Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/transport-simulator-caterpillar-pack)** Adds Construction Equipment to Minecraft ranging from bulldozers, front end loaders, excavators, road reclaimers, and much more ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/286703/description_c9cdc83d-3995-4551-bb99-eb16a9eefd43.png) * **[TESP:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iv-tesp)** Adding european signage, mostly based on central European signage with a hint of other Euro designs. * **[American Signs and Traffic Signals Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fwp-mts-iv-american-signs-and-traffic-signals-pack)** A vast collection of US style signs and signals based on the MUTCD. * **[Blu's Sign Pack (formerly Melvin's Simple Sign Pack):](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blus-sign-pack-mts-iv/files)** Signs, signs, everywhere a sign. With over 750+ signs to add to your city, you'll have more signs than cars in no time! * **[The Expanded Signs Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iv-tesp)** Oh, you need even more signs? Well here you go! * **[Cactus's Decor Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mts-iv-cactuss-decor-pack)** Like CFM, but for IV and with less tables. * **[VDeco:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-vdeco)** Pack with furniture, decor, devices. #### **Others** * **[Subcraftica:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/subcraftica)** Working seamouth submarine with upgrade modules, explore the minecraft sea in comfort!. * **[Spicy Sausesaig Gauge Pack:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spicy-sausesaig-gauge-pack-iv-mts)** Adds a nifty flight display for GAP planes! * **[NMCS: Not Minecraft Combat Simulator:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notminecraftcombatsimulator)** The London Underground experience, minus the wallet pain undefined ## **Features:** * **Realistic Physics:** Like really real. Planes takeoff like actual planes, running out of fuel doesn't make you fall like a rock, and ground physics are more than a vehicle sliding on ice. Plane flight takes into account speed, pitch, angle of attack, weight, engine life, propeller pitch, and much more. Vehicles are affected by speed, slick surfaces, blown tires, and even how many wheels are touching the ground. * **Joystick and Mouse Support:** Want to use that dusty old flight stick in Minecraft? Well now you can! Want to turn IV into Gran Turismo with a steering wheel? Also an option. IV gives you the ability to completely control any vehicle with any controller recognized as a joystick. If you're one of those people who thinks playing Minecraft with a controller is a sin, but still want a quicker response than the keyboard controls, then try out the built-in mouse yoke system. It's not perfect, but it allows for a flight experience that will be familiar to you if you've used Flan's or MCHeli. * **In-Game Manual:** Nobody wants to have to leave Minecraft to go look something up on a wiki. On this note IV comes equipped with a manual with details on how everything works in the mod. From how to build your first vehicle, to the specifics on engine care and why your engine is coughing out black smoke, the manual is the definitive guide for IV. Please do read it, as you just might learn something. * **Fully Customizable:** Maybe you want to have a plane to carry you and your buddy from your main base to a new one. Maybe you want to run ore shipments in the air to avoid the creepers that blow up your nice everythings. IV understands, and is comes with the ability to chose whether or not to equip your vehicle with seats or chests, allowing for numerous combinations of craft. Just don't try putting a chest in the pilot seat. That doesn't work too well… * **Pack-based:** Rather than having things built-in and forcing you to wait for updates to get new vehicles, IV allows you to expand your selection of vehicles through content packs. We recommend the official content pack, however other packs or even your own creations are welcome! If you're familiar with Flan's pack system you'll feel right at home with IV's. * **Working Gauges:**IV is proud to offer you the largest selection of gauges available in the modded vehicle market. From altimeters to display height, to heading indicators to display direction you'll find yourself wondering why you ever needed the debug screen to navigate. There are even indicators to tell you the temp and oil pressure of engines and the current voltage of the electrical system. Now you'll never have to wonder if that arrow that was fired at you did any damage! * **True Lighting:** In the aim of efficiency and making things look cool, IV vehicles are equipped with real lights. No more relying on dynamic lights and their constant chunk updates and TPS-sapping. IV planes use true OpenGL blending to create realistic lighting effects that actually brighten the world around you. (Disclaimer: IV cannot be held responsible for mobs ignoring lights and causing you material or personal harm. Please contact your nearest armory to see if True Lighting is right for you.) * **Inter-Mod Support:** Rather than making yet another fuel for vehicles, or forcing you to download a mod as a dependency for fuel, IV has chosen to let you define what is a fuel. By default Lava can be use to run engines, but IV includes the ability to use any liquid from any mod as a valid fuel. You can also use pipes to fill up the fuel pump in the mod, allowing you to have a never-ending stream of fuel to supply your vehicles. * **Extensive Configuration:** Nearly everything in MTS can be configured. From the crafting materials required to make a vehicle, to the choice of rendering the glass on the inside of a car. Forge OreDict is fully supported as well, ensuring maximum compatibility with other mods.   ## **Other Links:** * **[Discord](https://discord.gg/dzdqWWG2dE):** A great place to interact directly with the dev team and IV fans. * **[Mod GitHub](https://github.com/DonBruce64/MinecraftTransportSimulator):** Post issues here! Also contains a manual for how to make packs. * **[Pack GitHub](https://github.com/DonBruce64/MTSOfficialPack):** Useful if you want to make your own pack. Contains the Official Content Pack code which you can change to suit your needs.   ## **Videos:** From time to time we'll release videos demonstrating IV. As we get good ones, we'll post them here. Old videos can be found in the spoiler.  

  ## **Why the second mod for content?:** There have been a lot of changes from MFS to IV, but one of the biggest is the splitting of vehicles into their own mod. This may seem odd, but it allows other users to make their own vehicles and add them to IV without any interaction from the IV team. Some people say this will reduce quality, I say it will foster a community. We shall see who is right in the long run. If you happen to have a model or two you'd like to see on the IV platform drop by the Discord channel. We'd be more than happy to point you in the right direction!   May your flights be smooth and your rides be swift! ~Don
  • MAI: Mackrel Automotive Industries:A collection of European vehicles from them 40s to the 70s. Ideal if you need something RHD.
  • TRVP: Turbo's Random Vehicles Pack:Food trucks? Check. Patty Wagon? Check. Download? Check.
  • IPG: Immersive Poker's Garage:World's finest exotic and luxury cars. Adds some exotic supercars, and parts for them
  • DVT: Diamond Warriors Pack:Adds a good selection of vehicles. Models are simple and akin to classic Flansmod, so they won't hurt your FPS.

    • Sign and Decor Packs.

    • American Signs and Traffic Signals Pack:A vast collection of US style signs and signals based on the MUTCD.
    • Melvin's Simple Sign Pack:Signs, signs, everywhere a sign. With over 500+ signs to add to your city, you'll have more signs than cars in no time!
    • The Expanded Signs Pack:Oh, you need even more signs? Well here you go!
    • Cactus's Decor Pack:Like CFM, but for IV and with less tables.

    Small, New, and Old Packs.

    • Blocky Rage:A pack that adds different cars that can be disassembled.
    • Warfare 44:A selection of highly-detailed WWII era tanks.
    • City Cars:Pack for ordinary city cars, 1980-1990 and modern. Mostly Russian.
    • Randall Agriculture Pack:Tired of farming by hand? Colt 44 has planting and harvesting covered. Robots not included.
    • Naomi Retro Vehicles:From old to new machinecraft to minecraft these cars are back once again.
    • Spicy Sausesaig Gauge Pack:Adds a nifty flight display for GAP planes!
    • Kadwin Jurassic Park Vehicles Pack:For when you need a vehicle to get you to that remote generic engineering lab.


    Features:

    • Realistic Physics: Like really real. Planes takeoff like actual planes, running out of fuel doesn't make you fall like a rock, and ground physics are more than a vehicle sliding on ice. Plane flight takes into account speed, pitch, angle of attack, weight, engine life, propeller pitch, and much more. Vehicles are affected by speed, slick surfaces, blown tires, and even how many wheels are touching the ground.
    • Joystick and Mouse Support: Want to use that dusty old flight stick in Minecraft? Well now you can! Want to turn IV into Gran Turismo with a steering wheel? Also an option. IV gives you the ability to completely control any vehicle with any controller recognized as a joystick. If you're one of those people who thinks playing Minecraft with a controller is a sin, but still want a quicker response than the keyboard controls, then try out the built-in mouse yoke system. It's not perfect, but it allows for a flight experience that will be familiar to you if you've used Flan's or MCHeli.
    • In-Game Manual: Nobody wants to have to leave Minecraft to go look something up on a wiki. On this note IV comes equipped with a manual with details on how everything works in the mod. From how to build your first vehicle, to the specifics on engine care and why your engine is coughing out black smoke, the manual is the definitive guide for IV. Please do read it, as you just might learn something.
    • Fully Customizable: Maybe you want to have a plane to carry you and your buddy from your main base to a new one. Maybe you want to run ore shipments in the air to avoid the creepers that blow up your nice everythings. IV understands, and is comes with the ability to chose whether or not to equip your vehicle with seats or chests, allowing for numerous combinations of craft. Just don't try putting a chest in the pilot seat. That doesn't work too well...
    • Pack-based: Rather than having things built-in and forcing you to wait for updates to get new vehicles, IV allows you to expand your selection of vehicles through content packs. We recommend the official content pack, however other packs or even your own creations are welcome! If you're familiar with Flan's pack system you'll feel right at home with IV's.
    • Working Gauges:IV is proud to offer you the largest selection of gauges available in the modded vehicle market. From altimeters to display height, to heading indicators to display direction you'll find yourself wondering why you ever needed the debug screen to navigate. There are even indicators to tell you the temp and oil pressure of engines and the current voltage of the electrical system. Now you'll never have to wonder if that arrow that was fired at you did any damage!
    • True Lighting: In the aim of efficiency and making things look cool, IV vehicles are equipped with real lights. No more relying on dynamic lights and their constant chunk updates and TPS-sapping. IV planes use true OpenGL blending to create realistic lighting effects that actually brighten the world around you. (Disclaimer: IV cannot be held responsible for mobs ignoring lights and causing you material or personal harm. Please contact your nearest armory to see if True Lighting is right for you.)
    • Inter-Mod Support: Rather than making yet another fuel for vehicles, or forcing you to download a mod as a dependency for fuel, IV has chosen to let you define what is a fuel. By default Lava can be use to run engines, but IV includes the ability to use any liquid from any mod as a valid fuel. You can also use pipes to fill up the fuel pump in the mod, allowing you to have a never-ending stream of fuel to supply your vehicles.
    • Extensive Configuration: Nearly everything in MTS can be configured. From the crafting materials required to make a vehicle, to the choice of rendering the glass on the inside of a car. Forge OreDict is fully supported as well, ensuring maximum compatibility with other mods.

    Other Links:

    • Discord: A great place to interact directly with the dev team and IV fans.
    • Mod GitHub: Post issues here! Also contains a manual for how to make packs.
    • Pack GitHub: Useful if you want to make your own pack. Contains the Official Content Pack code which you can change to suit your needs.

    Videos:

    From time to time we'll release videos demonstrating IV. As we get good ones, we'll post them here. Old videos can be found in the spoiler.



    Why the second mod for content?:

    There have been a lot of changes from MFS to IV, but one of the biggest is the splitting of vehicles into their own mod. This may seem odd, but it allows other users to make their own vehicles and add them to IV without any interaction from the IV team. Some people say this will reduce quality, I say it will foster a community. We shall see who is right in the long run. If you happen to have a model or two you'd like to see on the IV platform drop by the Discord channel. We'd be more than happy to point you in the right direction!

    May your flights be smooth and your rides be swift!

    ~Don
